settings.heading: Discover Yemen in Every Sip
settings.text: Premium Yemeni coffee, roasted for a rich and unforgettable cup. The Harraz Signature Roast brings the warmth of our cafe ritual into your home brew.
settings.image_alt: Yemeni Corner Harraz Signature Roast coffee bag

settings.heading: Yemeni Corner Harraz Signature Roast
settings.text: One signature roast. One rich cup. A true taste of Yemeni coffee in a 340 g whole bean bag, ready for everyday brewing.

settings.heading: From our cafes to your kitchen
settings.text: Yemeni Corner started with hospitality: warm drinks, late conversations, and flavors rooted in Yemen. The Harraz Signature Roast carries that same feeling into a premium whole bean coffee you can brew at home.

settings.title: Grind fresh
settings.text: Start with whole beans and grind for your chosen brew method.

settings.title: Use clean water
settings.text: Good water helps the warm spice, cocoa, and dried fruit notes come forward.

settings.title: Brew with care
settings.text: Use drip, French press, pour-over, or espresso for a rich everyday cup.

settings.title: Enjoy warmly
settings.text: Serve it slowly, share it generously, and make the ritual your own.

settings.heading: Brew it slowly. Share it generously.
settings.text: Designed for familiar home methods, the Harraz Signature Roast brings warmth and depth to drip, French press, pour-over, and espresso.

settings.heading: Taste the cafe menu, then take the ritual home
settings.text: Our cafes serve traditional drinks, signature lattes, cold favorites, and desserts in person. The online shop focuses on whole bean coffee for brewing that Yemeni Corner warmth at home.

settings.label: Heritage
settings.title: Traditional Drinks
settings.text: Adeni tea, Mufawar coffee, Sana'ani coffee, Yemeni tea, mint tea, Jubani coffee, and Qishr.

settings.label: Signature
settings.title: Yemeni-Inspired Lattes
settings.text: Yemeni latte, pistachio latte, Lotus cookie butter latte, Tarim latte, date latte, and Yemeni matcha latte.

settings.label: Fresh
settings.title: Cold Drinks
settings.text: Tawahi lemonade, fruit lemonades, refreshers, iced Adeni, iced specialty lattes, and smoothies.

settings.label: At Home
settings.title: Harraz Signature Roast
settings.text: The online roast connects the cafe flavor story to a whole bean coffee you can brew at home.

settings.heading: Visit us for the full cafe menu
settings.text: Come for a cup, stay for the warmth. Our cafes bring Yemeni coffee, desserts, and hospitality into welcoming local spaces.

settings.title: South Windsor
settings.address:
350 Cabana Rd E
Windsor, ON N9G 1A3

settings.title: LaSalle
settings.hours: Open daily for coffee, desserts, and warm hospitality.

settings.question: What size is the coffee bag?
settings.answer: Yemeni Corner Harraz Signature Roast is sold as a 340 g whole bean coffee bag.

settings.question: What does it taste like?
settings.answer: The roast is built around warm spice, cocoa, and dried fruit notes with a smooth, aromatic finish.

settings.question: Can I order cafe drinks online?
settings.answer: The cafe menu is served in person at Yemeni Corner. The online shop is focused on whole bean coffee for home brewing.

settings.question: Where do you ship?
settings.answer: The online shop is set up for Canadian customers. Shipping rates and delivery options are shown at checkout.

settings.heading: Get Yemeni Corner coffee notes
settings.text: Join the list for brewing notes, cafe updates, and reminders when fresh Harraz Signature Roast is available online.
